summary: Tested Global Tax & Invoicing System. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: Fixed 2 critical bugs in TaxesTab.tsx (double /api/ prefix and SelectItem empty value). All features verified working after fixes.

bugs_fixed_by_tester.issue: All 7 API calls had double /api/ prefix (/api/admin/taxes/...) but axios instance baseURL already includes /api. Fixed by removing /api/ prefix from all 7 calls.
bugs_fixed_by_tester.root_cause: Axios instance at /lib/api.ts sets baseURL = REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL + '/api'. TaxesTab used /api/admin/taxes paths instead of /admin/taxes, resulting in /api/api/admin/taxes 404 errors.

bugs_fixed_by_tester.issue: SelectItem with value='' caused 'A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' runtime crash on Rate Table tab.
bugs_fixed_by_tester.root_cause: Shadcn Select component does not allow empty string as SelectItem value. Fixed by using 'all' as sentinel value for 'All Countries' option.
bugs_fixed_by_tester.fix: Changed filterCountry initial state from '' to 'all', changed SelectItem value from '' to 'all', updated params condition to check filterCountry !== 'all'

features_verified.admin_login: PASS - Logs in with admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!
features_verified.taxes_tab_navigation: PASS - Taxes tab visible in Commerce section
features_verified.taxes_3_subtabs: PASS - Tax Settings, Rate Table, Override Rules all visible
features_verified.tax_settings_toggle: PASS - Enable Tax Collection checkbox works
features_verified.tax_settings_country_dropdown: PASS - Country dropdown shows correctly after enabling
features_verified.tax_settings_state_input: PASS - Province code input appears for CA
features_verified.tax_settings_save_ca_on: PASS - Save succeeds with CA/ON, toast shown
features_verified.rate_table_ca_filter_13_entries: PASS - Filter by Canada shows exactly 13 provinces
features_verified.rate_table_edit_button: PASS - Edit (pencil) buttons visible per row
features_verified.override_rules_create: PASS - Create rule form works, 'Override rule created' toast
features_verified.override_rules_delete: PASS - Delete rule works after confirm dialog, 'Override rule deleted' toast
features_verified.customer_tax_exempt_checkbox: PASS - Tax Exempt checkbox in customer edit dialog
features_verified.customer_tax_exempt_save: PASS - Toggle + Save shows 'Customer updated' toast
features_verified.orders_tax_column: PASS - 'Tax' column header visible in Orders table

action_items: Clean up test override rules in DB (TEST_ prefixed ones from backend test runs)
Minor: Override rule edit/delete buttons lack data-testid attributes - consider adding data-testid='override-rule-edit-{id}' and 'override-rule-delete-{id}'
critical_code_review_comments: TaxesTab.tsx uses window.confirm() for delete confirmation - consider replacing with a proper Shadcn AlertDialog for better UX and testability
Override rule edit/delete buttons have no data-testid attributes making automated testing harder
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and cleaned up override rules. One rule 'Zero-rate exports' remains in DB from test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global Tax & Invoicing System is fully working. TaxesTab.tsx had double /api/ prefix bug (fixed). Rate Table SelectItem empty value bug (fixed). All 22 backend API tests pass. Admin login: admin@automateaccounts.local/ChangeMe123!. The calculate-tax endpoint requires customer JWT (not admin). Override rules use window.confirm() for delete.

double_api_prefix.description: TaxesTab.tsx used /api/admin/taxes/... paths with the axios instance that already has /api in baseURL
double_api_prefix.reproduction: Navigate to Admin > Taxes tab. Any API call results in 404 because URL becomes /api/api/admin/taxes/...
double_api_prefix.mitigation: Removed /api/ prefix from all 7 API calls in TaxesTab.tsx

selectitem_empty_value.description: Shadcn Select component throws runtime error when SelectItem has empty string value
selectitem_empty_value.reproduction: Navigate to Admin > Taxes > Rate Table - page crashes with 'A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
selectitem_empty_value.mitigation: Changed filterCountry state default from '' to 'all', changed SelectItem value to 'all', updated conditional to check !== 'all'
